nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(gcp.apigateway.gateway.request_count) as 'Requests' FROM Metric WHERE entity.guid = '{{entity.id}}' TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT average(gcp.apigateway.gateway.response_latencies) as 'Latency (ms)' FROM Metric WHERE entity.guid = '{{entity.id}}' TIMESERIES AUTO

SELECT 100 * filter(sum(gcp.apigateway.gateway.request_count), WHERE response_code_class = '5xx') / sum(gcp.apigateway.gateway.request_count) as 'Error Rate %' FROM Metric WHERE entity.guid = '{{entity.id}}' TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(gcp.apigateway.gateway.request_count) as 'Requests' FROM Metric WHERE entity.guid = '{{entity.id}}' FACET response_code_class TIMESERIES AUTO
